creator: sead@mail.ru
text:
Sorry for initial too small description.
 
 net/bounce by default limit time of connected session
 to six hours to reset hunged clients. It's annoing
 feature if you use bounce to for ex IRC redirect.
 
 I added -t option if you need this timer.
 By default bounce now do not drop connects
 more than six hours.
 
 SeaD <sead@mail.ru>
 fp: DC8C 6973 59DE 5580 FDF6 3153 005C 0156
